items.name_en: рЯФ•New Paseo Chain Style Small Dumpling BagрЯФ• Imported Nappa leather creates a lazy yet high-class vibeрЯТ• Exquisite craftsmanship, simple and elegant silhouetteрЯМє Beauty and utility combined, can be carried by hand, over shoulder, or crossbody, capacity is also greatрЯМЈ Suitable for French elegance, modern style, and sweet cool style alike. items.name_en: рЯФ• New Glossy Calfskin рЯТ• Puzzle Fold Cropped handbag plays with geometric shapes again в≠РпЄП Inspired by the geometric lines of the classic handbag series, reinterpreted with inlays full of geometric architectural beauty, can be folded completely, a good companion for travel. The brand uses creative ingenuity to create soft and lightweight handbags, paired with low-key and elegant brand logos. This cropped version is made of glossy Nappa cowhide. рЯМє This continues the geometric aesthetics of the Puzzle series рЯМЉ Inspired by origami bags, allowing this Puzzle Fold Cropped to switch freely between 3D and flat рЯМЇ The leather is very fine. The Puzzle Fold handbag draws inspiration from the geometric lines of the brand's classic handbag series рЯСЫ This version is made of soft glossy cowhide рЯФ• Handle length 29CM Size: 39CM~12.3CM~12.5CM
